authored_caveats: inputs.controllable_contractor_cash_cost: Zero is a placeholder assumption, not a measured contractor amount.
inputs.employee_cash_cost: Zero is a placeholder assumption, not a measured payroll amount.

industry_spec.value_basis: The basis describes only the selected HVAC-focused archetype, not NAICS 238220 as a whole.
industry_spec.value_basis: The role weights are source-free structural assumptions and must not be represented as observed staffing or payroll shares.
industry_spec.value_basis: The identifiers distinguish employee cash cost from controllable contractor cash cost but do not supply either amount.
industry_spec.value_basis: The approved categories define eligibility for investigation, not an automatic deduction; every deducted item still requires target-specific documentation.
industry_spec.value_basis: The dataset's five-digit labor share and occupation mix may not silently replace or relabel this assumption basis as target-specific evidence.

entries.title: Plumbing, Heating, and Air-Conditioning Contractors

authored_caveats: inputs.controllable_contractor_cash_cost: Replace only with target-specific contractor ledgers and statements of work.
inputs.employee_cash_cost: Replace only with target-specific payroll and burden evidence.
inputs.recognized_revenue: Custodial client funds cannot replace recognized revenue.
inputs.target_role_mix.roles[role_id=Client implementation, conversion, and integration].removable_fraction: Not task-time or measured savings evidence.
inputs.target_role_mix.roles[role_id=Client service and account management].removable_fraction: Not task-time or measured savings evidence.
inputs.target_role_mix.roles[role_id=Management and corporate support].removable_fraction: Not task-time or measured savings evidence.
inputs.target_role_mix.roles[role_id=New-business sales, partnerships, and marketing].removable_fraction: Not task-time or measured savings evidence.
inputs.target_role_mix.roles[role_id=Payroll production and payment operations].removable_fraction: Not task-time or measured savings evidence.
inputs.target_role_mix.roles[role_id=Payroll tax filing, remittance, and compliance operations].removable_fraction: Not task-time or measured savings evidence.
inputs.target_role_mix.roles[role_id=Technology, data, product, and security].removable_fraction: Not task-time or measured savings evidence.
industry_spec.value_basis: Assumption mode and NONE-quality source-free role weights require UNPROVEN readiness.
industry_spec.value_basis: The role weights are a mutually exclusive planning taxonomy, not measured employment or wage shares.

industry_spec.value_basis: The whole-industry labor-to-receipts ratio does not establish employee cash cost as a share of controllable value-added revenue and must not be substituted for a target-company cost pool.

industry_spec.value_basis: Contractor cash cost belongs in the numerator only when the contractor delivers operator-controlled value added; any denominator pass-through is excluded to prevent double counting.
industry_spec.value_basis: Client payroll and tax-remittance flows are custodial or settlement amounts, not the provider's recognized revenue or employee cash cost.

industry_spec.value_basis: The cost-pool identifiers define distinct categories but do not assert their magnitudes; each amount still requires a bounded packet value under the evidence contract or remains MISSING.

industry_spec.value_basis: An approved category is not automatically deductible: the packet still requires an amount, bounded range, accounting basis, and target-specific documentation, otherwise the deduction is zero or MISSING as required by the evidence state.
industry_spec.value_basis: Do not substitute accountants, auditors, general tax preparers, or bookkeeping clerks from four-digit NAICS 5412 as payroll-role evidence.

entries.title: Payroll Services

authored_caveats: inputs.controllable_contractor_cash_cost: This is not target financial evidence and cannot establish a cash-cost-to-revenue ratio.
inputs.employee_cash_cost: This is not target financial evidence and cannot establish a cash-cost-to-revenue ratio.
inputs.recognized_revenue: Gross billed revenue is not substituted for recognized revenue.
inputs.target_archetype_coverage: Frozen selection uncertainty remains material.
inputs.target_role_mix.roles[role_id=Controllable-contractor business analysis and delivery management].removable_fraction: Not empirical evidence of cash removability.
inputs.target_role_mix.roles[role_id=Controllable-contractor corporate and administrative support].removable_fraction: Not empirical evidence of cash removability.
inputs.target_role_mix.roles[role_id=Controllable-contractor integration, platform, data, and delivery operations].removable_fraction: Not empirical evidence of cash removability.

inputs.target_role_mix.roles[role_id=Employee corporate leadership and administration].removable_fraction: Not empirical evidence of cash removability.

inputs.target_role_mix.roles[role_id=Employee sales, solutions, and account management].removable_fraction: Not empirical evidence of cash removability.
inputs.target_role_mix.roles[role_id=Employee software engineering and architecture].removable_fraction: Not empirical evidence of cash removability.
industry_spec.value_basis: Assumption mode, ESTIMATE methods, NONE quality, and empty source lists force UNPROVEN readiness.
industry_spec.value_basis: The point weights are bounded allocation assumptions required by the schema, not empirical confidence estimates.
industry_spec.value_basis: Recognized revenue, every third-party pass-through category, positive bounded R_cva, and employee and contractor cash-cost amounts still require target-archetype evidence.
industry_spec.value_basis: Do not assume zero pass-through, silently use gross billed revenue, or deduct the same subcontracted cost from both R_cva and the V numerator.
industry_spec.value_basis: Selection uncertainty remains material because the selected and packaged-integration count ranges overlap.
industry_spec.value_basis: The normalized dataset's broad labor share and 5415 role mix are not deterministic evidence for this target archetype.
industry_spec.value_basis: No role weight encodes a removable fraction, implementation schedule, commercial retention, or expected outcome.

entries.title: Custom Computer Programming Services

authored_caveats: inputs.controllable_contractor_cash_cost: No target contractor ledger was supplied.
inputs.employee_cash_cost: No target payroll or benefits ledger was supplied.
industry_spec.value_basis: This assumption basis is unsupported evidence and must not be represented as observed, calculated, or proxy evidence.
industry_spec.value_basis: Do not substitute the broad 5415 occupation mix or a managed-services staffing model.

industry_spec.value_basis: Controllable contractor work is included only when the operator controls the delivered value added; a documented reimbursed outside-provider pass-through is excluded from both R_cva and V costs.
industry_spec.value_basis: Hardware or software acquisition cost removed from gross recognized revenue may not also be included in the employee or contractor cash-cost pool.
industry_spec.value_basis: The weights allocate the combined employee and controllable-contractor cash-cost pool; they do not establish either pool's dollar amount or share of revenue.

entries.title: Computer Systems Design Services

authored_caveats: inputs.controllable_contractor_cash_cost: Freelance linguist purchases are not presumed pass-through or quantified here.
inputs.employee_cash_cost: Broad-industry payroll share is not a substitute.
inputs.normalized_y5_operating_state: No sponsor transformation is assumed.
inputs.recognized_revenue: Gross billings are not substituted for controllable value-added revenue.
inputs.target_archetype_coverage: The provider cohort is incomplete and selection uncertainty remains true.
industry_spec.value_basis: Do not use any veterinary occupation from the dataset's 4-digit 5419 OEWS mix.
industry_spec.value_basis: Do not treat employee payroll share as total controllable cash cost in a contractor-intensive provider model.
industry_spec.value_basis: Do not infer revenue pass-through, controllable contractor cost, or mutually exclusive role weights from worker counts, task incidence, or broad-industry occupation shares.
industry_spec.value_basis: Selection uncertainty requires any future target-specific basis to encompass plausible reclassification to the overlapping interpreting-led archetype.
